steps.title: Solve for c in terms of b
steps.content: Set the two expressions equal: $2.6b = 0.75c$, so $c = \frac{2.6b}{0.75} = \frac{52}{15}b$.

steps.title: Test all four choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘195’: This would mean $c \approx 1.95b$. But $c = \frac{52}{15}b \approx 3.47b$, so 195 is far too small. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘200’: This would mean $c = 2b$. Still much less than $3.47b$. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘260’: This would mean $c \approx 2.60b$. Closer but still significantly below $3.47b$. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘347’: $\frac{52}{15} \approx 3.4667$, so $p \approx 346.7$, which rounds to 347. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
